meta._invariant: RESOLVED: Jump Crypto restored the custody to ~113,433 WETH (> the ~93,769 whETH obligation) -> backing covers supply, breach cleared.

metadata._fidelity: backing = REAL on-chain WETH.balanceOf(Wormhole custody) @ this block; whETH circulating supply (Solana) is researcher-asserted ~93,769 (legit pre-hack bridged ETH, ~= pre-hack custody backing). The attacker minted 120k unbacked whETH on Solana and redeemed ~93,750 on Ethereum, draining the custody; Jump Crypto deposited 120k ETH ~Feb 3-4 to restore backing. Σremote is off-chain (Solana, unreadable by Ethereum-only key) — disclosed MEDIUM confidence.
